category_sources: Official README describes xh as a friendly and fast tool for sending HTTP requests.
source_facts.description says xh is a tool for sending HTTP requests.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses xh.
docs_sources: Official README contains installation, usage, options, request item syntax, and examples.

tags_sources: Official README says xh reimplements HTTPie design for HTTP requests and documents request-item syntax.
